devdoc.details: 管理tcf——nft的价格，比例，有效时长，支持的token地址

ESafeTransferFrom(address,address,uint25.details: 安全转移无效的token，可以删除，因为后面会在TCF_NFT中实现

addSupportedToken(address).details: 添加支持的代币地址列表（原生代币不需要传入地址）。构造函数中已经添加了原生代币TC。 如果项目只支持TC，则不需要调用这个函数。

balanceOf(address,uint256).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOf}. Requirements: - `account` cannot be the zero address.

balanceOfBatch(address[],uint256[]).details: See {IERC1155-balanceOfBatch}.没有实现 Requirements: - `accounts` and `ids` must have the same length.

params.tokenAddress: 支付代币地址；原生代币传入address(0)

checkInitPricesParams((address,uint256)[.details: 初始化价格参数检查：长度、代币是否在支持列表内等。

params.prices: 6种NFT的价格参数（每种NFT包含 supportedTokenAmount 个价格项）

returns._0: 错误码/错误信息；成功时为空字符串

getNFTPrice(uint256,address).details: 获取某个NFT在某种支付方式下的价格。

params._tokenAddress: 支付代币地址；原生代币传入address(0)

returns._0: errorMessage 错误码/错误信息；成功时为空字符串

initPrice((address,uint256)[][6]).details: 初始化价格.TC代币的地址设为0

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

initPrice((address,uint256)[][6]).notice: 只能调用一次，调用前必须确保支持的代币地址已经初始化，不需要检查token地址是否初始化，因为在构造函数中，初始化了TC
